item.name: 03B - Branch Pickup Multiple Same-Day Requests
item.description: Verifies balance-based same-day pickup request reservations and idempotency. Requires appToken and pickupSubscriptionId for an active pickup subscription with remainingMeals=5.

item.name: Retry pickup request A with same idempotencyKey

exec: pm.test("A retry returns same request", function () { pm.expect(json?.data?.requestId).to.equal(pm.environment.get("pickupRequestAId")); });

item.name: Extra pickup request D fails when balance exhausted

exec: pm.test("D fails with insufficient credits", function () { pm.expect(pm.response.code).to.equal(422); pm.expect(json?.error?.code).to.equal("INSUFFICIENT_CREDITS"); });

item.name: Pickup queue shows separate same-day request rows

exec: pm.test("A/B/C are visible as request rows", function () { ids.forEach((id) => pm.expect(rows.some((row) => row?.ids?.pickupRequestId === id)).to.equal(true)); });
